title: Mukagali
overview: A Man of great talent. Misunderstood and censored genius. Loving caring father. Lonely fighter for freedom. Eagle of High Mountains. Lucky, but Ill-fated Poet, whom we never knew. Mukagali Makataev became recognized only after his death in 1976. Nowadays he is named as legendary poet of Kazakh literature.

trailers.title: 'Mukagali': exclusive first trailer for Kazakh poet biopic playing in Tallinn Black Nights
